# Summary

<!-- Briefly describe the change and the motivation behind it. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] perf: performance improvement
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] test: adding or fixing tests
- [ ] chore / ci: tooling, dependencies, CI

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm test` locally
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I have updated documentation where appropriate
- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) spec

## Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- If this is a UI change, please include before/after screenshots. -->
